headline: MAC ESSENTIAL
title: Your wallpaper, alive and breathing.
subtitle: Wallnetic fills every display with GPU-accelerated live video wallpapers — smart enough to pause when you're on battery, beautiful enough to make your desk feel like art.

headline: COMMUNITY FAVORITE
title: Every dollar saved starts with a pause.
subtitle: paus turns any price tag into real work hours, making impulse buys feel less automatic. Set reminders, track your wins, and spend the way you actually intend to.

headline: EDITORS' CHOICE
title: AI prompts, engineered with precision.
subtitle: Avalon is a privacy-first visual IDE for crafting and managing AI image prompts — build them as structured JSON, let the built-in assistant refine individual fields, and reverse-engineer uploads in seconds.

headline: MUST TRY
title: Share secrets once — then they're gone.
subtitle: SecretDrop wraps passwords, API keys, and credentials in end-to-end encrypted links that self-destruct on first view. No account needed, no plain-text storage, no second chances.
